Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Slidecaster
Punchline: Highlights the final safe-move window while casting.
Description: Adds a cast-bar overlay that marks the slidecasting timeframe so you can start moving without interrupting the cast. Includes an optional audio cue when the safe window begins.
Changelog:
v1.0.3: Added right-edge overlay end-trim control, exact numeric size inputs, and Save Current as Defaults / Reset to Saved Defaults actions.
v1.0.2: Added setting to hide the cast-bar frame border around the overlay.
v1.0.1: Added configurable overlay height and safe-bar height controls; settings title now shows plugin version.
v1.0.0: Initial release with cast-bar safe-zone overlay, configurable timing, and optional safe-move sound cue.
